programs.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Leading Lady
programs.desc: The British government is about to buy the plans to a revolutionary bomb detonator when its plans are stolen and its Austrian inventor murdered. Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson go to Vienna to track down the plans.

programs.title: Cold Zone
programs.desc: A storm is coming. No one could predict it. No one can measure it.Now one family must survive it. You can't come in from the cold.

programs.title: Secrets that Kill
programs.desc: Jenny’s not at all happy when mom Laura returns from a world cruise with a new younger husband, Brett. When Laura soon ends up in a coma and long-time family housekeeper Anna is killed, Jenny’s suspicions of Brett deepen. But when her new stepdad proves his innocence, Jenny has to consider who else might want her dead and why.

programs.title: Amish Abduction
programs.desc: Amish wife and mother Annie faces a crisis when her husband leaves the word of the Amish to live among normal Americans, or the English as the Amish dub them. But things turn even more dire when her husband returns, seeking custody of their son, and is willing to kill to achieve his goal…

programs.title: The Quest: The Longest Drive
programs.desc: To help out an old friend and save his ranch, the Beaudine brothers gather a bunch of oddballs to help drive a big herd to market. Dive into the exciting adventure with a stable worker, a retired gunslinger, a washed-up drunk, and two crafty rustlers as they take on the dusty trail.
